title: How do you document what you have created

posts.author: DipaliPatankar (Dipali Patankar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Question for those you have created frameworks and workflows on monday - how do you document what you have done to help with the ongoing support and updates?

Every software development I have seen always has some documentation to help those supporting the app. We have implemented a 3 tier framework for portfolio management and reporting which is becoming quite complex and I was wondering what the best way to document the connections and automations is. Any help will be deeply appreciated
